notes: Task 1 implementation in commit 87e5a61 matches tech-spec D24 items 1-3 exactly. AllowedModel gains three Boolean fields (llmSupportImage/Audio/Thinking) with Kotlin defaults = false — Gson idiomatically falls back to these when JSON keys are missing. AllowedModelConfig gains `systemPromptDefault: String? = null`; AllowedModel.toModel() reads it via `defaultConfig?.systemPromptDefault.orEmpty()`, which correctly collapses both 'defaultConfig missing' and 'systemPromptDefault null' to empty string. ConfigKeys.SYSTEM_PROMPT_DEFAULT uses the exact id/label specified in D24. createLlmChatConfigs adds `defaultSystemPrompt: String = ""` at the end of the signature (as D24 prescribes) and emits LabelConfig unconditionally — downstream Task 10 will read it from Model.configValues[SYSTEM_PROMPT_DEFAULT.label]. The only non-test caller in core-runtime/ (ModelAllowlist.kt) uses named arguments, so adding a trailing param is non-breaking. Tests cover all six TDD anchors from the task spec; the `minimalModelJson` helper yields valid JSON in all branches (empty/non-empty inserts). Fixture and prod asset are byte-identical at HEAD, so fixtureMatchesProductionAsset stays green (the existing test, not touched by this commit, continues to guard sync). No cross-file inconsistencies: Model.kt already declares the three llmSupport* fields being wired. Scope for task 10 (DefaultModelRegistry.awaitInitialize wiring) is correctly deferred and not duplicated here.
